RuleSet.Name: src/schemaprot/ISchemaProtTableH.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 protected interface for a $TableName$ history object

GenFile.Name: reallyFileISchemaProtTableHJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$prot

RuleSet.GenRule: public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
public $implJavaAtomType$ get$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$(); public void set$implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$( $implJavaAtomType$ $lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$Name$ );
$declProtRecHPKeyAccessors$$reference PrimaryKeyIndex iterate Columns( each declProtRecHPKeyAttrAccessors empty empty )$$declProtRecHDataGetterSetters$
extends I$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable DefSchemaName$Prot$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable TableName$H
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$ src );$declProtRecHSetRecH$
public void set( I$reference BaseClass DefSchemaName$Prot$reference BaseClass TableName$H src );
$switch HasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declProtRecHSetRec$ public void set$TableName$( I$DefSchemaName$Prot$TableName$ src );$declProtRecHSetDefRecH$
